title: Annual financial report
doc_html:
§3512.  Annual financial report

The condition of the fund shall be reported to the governing authority of the municipality by the board's secretary every January.  

Redesignated from R.S. 33:2232 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.

§3512.  Annual financial report
